name: LP Mining with LP2Graph: A Use Case for Railway Rescheduling
summary: arXiv:2607.11980v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Like many optimization-driven domains, railway rescheduling relies on Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP), yet the field's modeling knowledge is...
description: arXiv:2607.11980v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Like many optimization-driven domains, railway rescheduling relies on Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP), yet the field's modeling knowledge is scattered across hundreds of papers in incompatible notations, and narrative surveys organize it subjectively: they classify models by vocabulary rather than by structure, and reproduce neither. We pr...
author: J\"orn Maurischat, Nikola Be\v{s}inovi\'c, Michael F\"arber
